hero.text: Embrace the uncertainties; they lead to new beginnings.
hero.author: Unknown

aries.general: Today encourages you to take risks. Your bold nature will bring unexpected rewards.
aries.love: Romantic sparks fly today. Open your heart and let passion guide you.
aries.career: A challenging project will demonstrate your leadership skills. Showcase your talents.

taurus.general: Today rewards patience. Slow down and appreciate the small joys around you.
taurus.love: Stable connections deepen. Cherish the comfort of intimacy with your partner.
taurus.career: Pragmatism leads to success. Your methodical approach will be recognized.

gemini.general: Communication flows easily today. Engage in lively discussions and share ideas.
gemini.love: A light-hearted conversation could spark a new romance. Be open to the unexpected.
gemini.career: Collaborative efforts will lead to breakthroughs. Team up for greater success.

cancer.general: Emotional clarity brings peace today. Trust your instincts and nurture your soul.
cancer.love: Be open about your feelings. Honesty will strengthen your bonds.
cancer.career: Use your intuition to navigate workplace dynamics. Your sensitivity is a strength.

leo.general: Your dynamic energy inspires others. Step into the spotlight and lead with confidence.
leo.love: Romantic gestures will impress today. Show affection in creative ways.
leo.career: Creative ideas will shine. Use your imaginative power to propose innovative solutions.

virgo.general: Focus on details to achieve your goals. Your meticulous nature will pay off.
virgo.love: Subtle connections deepen. Take time to understand your partner's needs.
virgo.career: Your analytical skills are valued today. Tackle challenges with a clear mind.

professional.text: Opportunities multiply as they are seized.
professional.author: Sun Tzu

professional.text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
professional.author: Henry David Thoreau

professional.text: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow will be our doubts of today.
professional.author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

professional.text: The future depends on what you do today.
professional.author: Mahatma Gandhi

professional.text: Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
professional.author: Sam Levenson

professional.text: Success is not the key to happiness. Happiness is the key to success.
professional.author: Albert Schweitzer

motivation.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
motivation.author: Theodore Roosevelt

motivation.text: What you get by achieving your goals is not as important as what you become by achieving your goals.
motivation.author: Zig Ziglar

motivation.text: Act as if what you do makes a difference. It does.
motivation.author: William James

motivation.text: You are never too old to set another goal or to dream a new dream.
motivation.author: C.S. Lewis

motivation.text: Keep your face always toward the sunshine—and shadows will fall behind you.
motivation.author: Walt Whitman

motivation.text: Success is the sum of small efforts, repeated day in and day out.
motivation.author: Robert Collier

captions.text: Every day is a new beginning.
captions.author: Unknown

tech.text: Technology is best when it brings people together.
tech.author: Matt Mullenweg

tech.text: The art challenges the technology, and the technology inspires the art.
tech.author: John Lasseter

tech.text: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.
tech.author: Steve Jobs

tech.text: The advance of technology is based on making it fit in so that you don’t even even notice it.
tech.author: Bill Gates

tech.text: It has become appallingly obvious that our technology has exceeded our humanity.
tech.author: Albert Einstein

tech.text: The technology you use impresses no one. The experience you create with it is everything.
tech.author: Sean Gerety

fun.text: Laughter is timeless, imagination has no age, and dreams are forever.
fun.author: Walt Disney

fun.text: The most wasted of days is one without laughter.
fun.author: E. E. Cummings

fun.text: A day without laughter is a day wasted.
fun.author: Charlie Chaplin

fun.text: Life is either a daring adventure or nothing at all.
fun.author: Helen Keller

fun.text: You only live once, but if you do it right, once is enough.
fun.author: Mae West

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don’t see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: You must be the change you wish to see in the world.
faith.author: Mahatma Gandhi

faith.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
faith.author: Steve Jobs

faith.text: Everything has beauty, but not everyone sees it.
faith.author: Confucius

faith.text: What lies behind us and what lies before us are tiny matters compared to what lies within us.
faith.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

faith.text: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
faith.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

wisdom.text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: An unexamined life is not worth living.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: Wisdom is not a product of schooling but of the lifelong attempt to acquire it.
wisdom.author: Albert Einstein

wisdom.text: The greatest way to live with honor in this world is to be who we pretend to be.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: To know what you prefer instead of humbly saying amen to what the world tells you to prefer, is to have kept your soul alive.
wisdom.author: Robert Louis Stevenson

wisdom.text: It is not what we have learned, but what we do with what we have learned that matters.
wisdom.author: Unknown
